title: EMWAVER_DIY
description: EMWaver DIY is a do‑it‑yourself EMWaver board: slightly larger, but designed so you can use your own ESP32‑S3 module and CC1101 radio module to reach functionality similar to the flagship EMWaver. It includes an IR receiver + IR LEDs, plus USB‑C for power/programming and USB communication. Bonus: the ESP32‑S3 native USB stack also enables USB device emulation.
